cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste! Welcome to our Quikr Jobs listing. How can I assist you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hi, I'm Kartik Sethi. I saw your outdoor furniture listing and I'm interested. Can you tell me a bit more about it, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, wonderful choice, sir! Our outdoor furniture set is made of high-quality wood and is perfect for gardens or patios. We're asking for Rs. 25,000.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That's a bit out of my budget. I was thinking more along the lines of Rs. 20,000. Can we negotiate the price, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, I completely understand. Let me see what I can do for you. How about we meet in the middle at Rs. 22,500? It's the best price I can offer.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 54s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A legitimate buyer on [MARKETPLACE_PLATFORM] calls the seller to negotiate the price of a [FURNITURE_ITEM]. After agreeing on a price, they confirm they will pay via [UPI_APP] in person during pickup after inspecting the item.
